title: avena sempervirens var. notarisii
intro: Avena sempervirens var. notarisii, also known as oats or wild oat, is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. This plant is rich in medicinal properties, particularly in its seeds, which contain a compound called avenanthramides that have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Avena sempervirens var. notarisii include soothing digestive issues, reducing stress and anxiety, and promoting better sleep. The herbal preparations of this plant include tea infusions and tinctures, which can be consumed for their medicinal properties.
